title: WhatsApp Tips Easier (and Safer) In-Car Messaging, Adds 3 New Useful Features
summary: Behind the wheel, Meta says it has “completely refreshed the experience” across Android Auto and Apple CarPlay, which previously offered different levels of functionality for drivers. "Now you can hear and respond to messages, make calls, see your call history, and reach…
